title: 插画艺术风格创作
description:
案例「man's hair color」属于插画艺术风格创作。这是一条综合视觉案例，需要从原始提示词中提炼画面类型、主体、风格、构图、文字和用途，再转成中文展示版与可填空模板。

原始提示词要点：这条案例原文以英文描述画面，需要转成中文展示版。它的主要内容包括：An anime-风格 光线 novel cover 插画 featuring two 角色s in an intimate pose. On the left, a young woman with short dark hair, purple eyes, wearing a white hat, a frilly white dress with a pink bow tie, white gloves, and two white flower hairpins. She has an affectionate, teasing smile and is gently touching the chin of the man next to her. On the right, an adult man with 【man's hair color：red】 hair parted in the middle, purple eyes, and a 光线 goatee. He is wearing a black 按钮-down shirt and has a s光线ly annoyed, reluctant expression with a sweat drop on his cheek. The scene features soft, romantic 光线ing with out-of-focus purple flower petals in the foreground corners. The image includes several 日文文字 elements: a large stylized main 标题 at the bottom reading 【main 标题：ちかつば】, a sub标题 below it reading 【sub标题：ーその溺愛、独占欲の裏返し。ー】, vertical text on the top left reading 【left quote：可愛いだけじゃ、許さない。】, and vertical text on the top right reading 【right quote：その不機嫌、俺だけに向けろよ。】.
prompt_raw: An anime-style light novel cover illustration featuring two characters in an intimate pose. On the left, a young woman with short dark hair, purple eyes, wearing a white hat, a frilly white dress with a pink bow tie, white gloves, and two white flower hairpins. She has an affectionate, teasing smile and is gently touching the chin of the man next to her. On the right, an adult man with red hair parted in the middle, purple eyes, and a light goatee. He is wearing a black button-down shirt and has a slightly annoyed, reluctant expression with a sweat drop on his cheek. The scene features soft, romantic lighting with out-of-focus purple flower petals in the foreground corners. The image includes several Japanese text elements: a large stylized main title at the bottom reading ちかつば, a subtitle below it reading ーその溺愛、独占欲の裏返し。ー, vertical text on the top left reading 可愛いだけじゃ、許さない。, and vertical text on the top right reading その不機嫌、俺だけに向けろよ。.

原始提示词要点：这条案例原文以英文描述画面，需要转成中文展示版。它的主要内容包括：An anime-风格 光线 novel cover 插画 featuring two 角色s in an intimate pose. On the left, a young woman with short dark hair, purple eyes, wearing a white hat, a frilly white dress with a pink bow tie, white gloves, and two white flower hairpins. She has an affectionate, teasing smile and is gently touching the chin of the man next to her. On the right, an adult man with 【man's hair color：red】 hair parted in the middle, purple eyes, and a 光线 goatee. He is wearing a black 按钮-down shirt and has a s光线ly annoyed, reluctant expression with a sweat drop on his cheek. The scene features soft, romantic 光线ing with out-of-focus purple flower petals in the foreground corners. The image includes several 日文文字 elements: a large stylized main 标题 at the bottom reading 【main 标题：ちかつば】, a sub标题 below it reading 【sub标题：ーその溺愛、独占欲の裏返し。ー】, vertical text on the top left reading 【left quote：可愛いだけじゃ、許さない。】, and vertical text on the top right reading 【right quote：その不機嫌、俺だけに向けろよ。】.
prompt_template_cn:
生成一张【主题】的视觉设计图。

画面主体：
主要表现【主体对象】，突出【核心特征】。

风格与氛围：
整体风格为【视觉风格】，氛围为【情绪氛围】，主色调为【主色调】。

构图与背景：
采用【构图方式】，背景包含【背景元素】，辅助元素包括【辅助元素】。

文字内容：
如需文字，显示【文字内容】，要求清晰可读，不要乱码。

输出要求：
画面比例为【画面比例】，适合用于【使用场景】。
variables_json: [{"key":"field_1","label":"主题","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入主题","required":true,"type":"text"},{"key":"field_2","label":"主体对象","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入主体对象","required":true,"type":"text"},{"key":"field_3","label":"核心特征","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入核心特征","required":true,"type":"text"},{"key":"field_4","label":"视觉风格","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入视觉风格","required":true,"type":"text"},{"key":"field_5","label":"情绪氛围","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入情绪氛围","required":true,"type":"text"},{"key":"field_6","label":"主色调","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入主色调","required":true,"type":"text"},{"key":"field_7","label":"构图方式","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入构图方式","required":true,"type":"text"},{"key":"field_8","label":"背景元素","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入背景元素","required":true,"type":"long_text"},{"key":"field_9","label":"辅助元素","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入辅助元素","required":true,"type":"long_text"},{"key":"field_10","label":"文字内容","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入文字内容","required":true,"type":"long_text"},{"key":"field_11","label":"画面比例","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入画面比例","required":true,"type":"text"},{"key":"field_12","label":"使用场景","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入使用场景","required":true,"type":"text"}]
